explanations.2: mktemp creates a temporary file with a unique name and stores that filename in the variable tempfile.
explanations.5: The > operator redirects output to overwrite the file; >> appends to the file instead.
explanations.28: cat --show-ends --show-tabs makes invisible characters visible ($ for line endings, ^I for tabs), then tr converts each newline character into a # so the entire file becomes one long string.
explanations.31: The backslashes before the dollar signs escape them so they're treated as literal $ characters in the expected string, not as shell variable references.
